title: A Prehistoric Island
description: On pages 5–8, a prehistoric island as the Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger.
scene: A Prehistoric Island. The Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It seems those two aren't actually interfering with our business...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then shall we resume carrying out our mission,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Just calm down for a damn second!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It appears you two are interfering with our mission after all...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Since you want to kill each other so much...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Jeez! What the heck was that!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Allow us to do you a favour by killing you.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Ugh, I've had enough! Let me kill you off already!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: With my Kilo Kilo Fruit's ability, that is...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Right now, my weight is only 1kg, allowing me to float just from the shockwave created by an explosion!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Mr. Bushido, watch out! That woman is...

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on a prehistoric island. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
